title: Create Woensdag
description: This is the modpack for the Create Woensdag server. This modpack is based around Create with addons. It is aimed to provide a vanilla+ experience.
body:
![Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd212bf5f259695c93acf51f7db7c0274e208b5c.jpeg)

# Welcome to the Create Woensdag Modpack

## What is this Modpack?
This is the modpack for the Create Woensdag server. This modpack is based around Create with addons. It is aimed to provide a vanilla+ experience.

## What other mods are included?
This modpack uses Create and addons, Ribbits, Tom's storage, Man of Many planes and more! These mods aim to enhance the storage options for your playthrough, introduce new ways to travel and build and some frogs to keep you comfort.

It is rounded out with some general performance and quality of life mods.

Create Addons:
Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Create Deco, Create: Armor Trims, Create: Copycats+, Create Slice & Dice, Create Man of Many Planes (+Immersive Aircraft, +Man Of Many Planes), Create: Interiors, Create: High Pressure, Create Goggles, Create: Power Loader (Fabric), Netherracked, Create Jetpack and Create Railways Navigator, Create: Dreams & Desires, Create Contraption Terminals, Create Enchantment Industry Fabric & Create: Numismatics!

Otrher Mods:
Sodium, Iris Shaders, JEI, Inventorio, Zoomify, Indium,Macaw's Furniture, Xaero's World Map + Minimap, Chisel Reborn, ReplayMod, Jade 🔍,Jade Addons (Fabric), AppleSkin, Mod Menu, Tom's Simple Storage Mod, +All needed APIs & libraries, way too many optimization mods.

Server Only Mods:
Whitelistd.

Shaderpacks:
Complementary Shaders - Reimagined, Complementary Shaders - Unbound, MakeUp - Ultra Fast, Rethinking Voxels, BSL

Recourse Packs: Better Visible Ores

Supported versions:
Fabric 1.20.1

Issues:
Report bugs & issues to the issue tracker.

You need the Modrinth App to use the modpack. No plans adding CurseForge support anytime.

Credits to [Not Awake Studios](https://modrinth.com/organization/NotAwakeStudios) for the initial inspiration.
